body_txt: This is a tattoo that is actually its own living creature. Sometimes it is a two-dimensional animated being who is restricted to the surface it's inscribed upon, but other times it can leap off that surface and interact with the outside world as its own physical being. The two-dimensional version can be Played for Laughs since it physically resides on its owner, while the three-dimensional version can overlap with Summon Magic , depending on whether or not the owner has control over it. In Urban Fantasy , this trope is typically the mark of an especially punky witch or Art Attacker . For when the pigment's on a canvas and not skin, try Living Drawing . See also Art Initiates Life and Power Tattoo .
